deleteAccountConfirmationDescription: [ka] This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove your data from our servers.
accountDeletedToastDescription: [ka] Your account and all local data have been removed.
deactivateDiscountDescription: [ka] You have an active discount of {{percentage}}%. Deactivating it is permanent and cannot be undone.
discountEligibilityDescription: [ka] Congratulations! You are eligible for a {{percentage}}% discount on your next 3 trips. Activate the code below to apply it to your account.
discountActivatedToastDescription: [ka] Your {{percentage}}% discount has been applied to your account.
discountDeactivatedToastDescription: [ka] Your active discount has been removed.
increaseLimitByVerifying: [ka] Increase your limit by verifying your identity.
showQrToDriver: [ka] Show this QR code to the driver for verification.
foodDescription: [ka] This is where the Food feature will live.
onTheBusToastDescription: [ka] You can now add songs to the bus playlist.
insufficientBalanceToastDescription: [ka] Your ERITAS Pay balance is too low to book this trip. Please top-up.
seatBookedNotificationDescription: [ka] Your seat {{seat}} on bus {{plate}} is confirmed.
fareDeductedToastDescription: [ka] The fare of GH₵{{fare}} has been deducted.
homeGreeting: [ka] Hi {{name}}, ready for your next trip?
homeSubGreeting: [ka] Find the perfect bus for your journey
welcomeMessage: [ka] Your journey starts here. Access your account or create a new one.
enterCardDetailsDescription: [ka] Enter your VISA card credentials to link it.
topUpEritasPayWalletDescription: [ka] Enter the amount you want to transfer from your linked VISA card.
cardLinkedToastDescription: [ka] Your VISA card has been synchronized with your ERITAS Pay account.
invalidAmountToastDescription: [ka] Please enter a valid amount to top up.
topUpSuccessfulToastDescription: [ka] GH₵{{amount}} has been added to your ERITAS Pay balance.
browseAndAddSongs: [ka] Browse and add songs to the playlist.
boardBusToSeePlaylist: [ka] Board a bus to see the playlist
playlistOnlyOnTrip: [ka] The bus playlist is only available during your trip.
noBusesFound: [ka] No buses found for this route.
enterDestinationToSeeBuses: [ka] Enter a destination to see available buses.
signInToEditProfile: [ka] Please sign in to edit your profile.
profileUpdatedToastDescription: [ka] Your profile changes have been saved successfully.
passwordUpdatedToastDescription: [ka] Your password has also been updated.
linkedDevicesDescription: [ka] These are the devices that are currently signed in to your account.
unlinkDeviceDescription: [ka] Are you sure you want to unlink the {{deviceName}}? It will be signed out of your account.
routeAlertsDescription: [ka] Real-time updates about your bus route.
bookingAlertsDescription: [ka] Confirmations and reminders for your bookings.
systemAlertsDescription: [ka] Important updates about the app and services.
linkedDevicesDescriptionSettings: [ka] See other phones using this account
paymentMethodsDescription: [ka] Add/remove MoMo, cards, Eritas Pay wallet
eritasPayDescription: [ka] Your primary wallet for all in-app payments.
linkedCardsDescription: [ka] Manage your connected credit and debit cards.
removeCardDescription: [ka] Are you sure you want to remove the card ending in {{last4}}?
mobileMoneyDescription: [ka] Manage your connected Mobile Money accounts.
removeMomoAccountDescription: [ka] Are you sure you want to remove this Mobile Money account?
yourTripHistoryDescription: [ka] A log of all your completed bus journeys.
noTripHistoryDescription: [ka] You haven't completed any trips yet.
pinLoginDescription: [ka] Secure your app with a 4-digit PIN.
biometricLoginDescription: [ka] Use Face ID or fingerprint to log in.
twoFactorAuthDescription: [ka] Add an extra layer of security to your account.
enterDetailsDescription: [ka] Enter the phone number and amount for the top-up.
signUpSuccessfulToastDescription: [ka] Your account has been created. Welcome to Eritas Gateway!
mapLoadError: [ka] Google Maps failed to load. This might be due to a missing API key, or billing not being enabled on your Google Cloud project. Please check the browser console for a `BillingNotEnabledMapError` or other specific errors.
mapConfigErrorDescription: [ka] Google Maps API Key is missing from your environment variables.
noConnectionDescription: [ka] Please check your internet connection and try again. The app will automatically reconnect when it's back online.
smartRoutingDescription: [ka] Our intelligent algorithms find the fastest and most efficient routes, so you get to your destination sooner.
gpsTrackingDescription: [ka] Track your bus in real-time on the map. Know exactly when it will arrive and plan your time better.
personalMusicDescription: [ka] Enjoy a personalized playlist based on your favorite music. Your journey, your soundtrack.
realTimeAvailabilityDescription: [ka] Check seat availability and book your ticket instantly. No more waiting or uncertainty.
frostedGlassUiDescription: [ka] Experience ERITAS' unique frosted glass UI on another level.
tellUsMoreDescription: [ka] Help us personalize your experience by sharing your favorites.
favouriteDestinationPlaceholder: [ka] e.g., Cape Coast Castle, Kakum National Park
lowBalanceWarningToastDescription: [ka] ERITAS Pay wallet's balance is running low, top-up now to continue enjoying our trips.
notOnBusToastDescription: [ka] You must be on a bus to add songs to the playlist.
alreadyInPlaylistToastDescription: [ka] {{title}} is already in the bus playlist.
addedToPlaylistToastDescription: [ka] {{title}} by {{artist}} has been added to the bus playlist.
cannotRemoveSongToastDescription: [ka] You can only remove songs you have added.
songRemovedToastDescription: [ka] The song has been removed from the playlist.
